Short Title, , , provided that , enacting this subchapter and subchapter LXXVIII (§ 1300g et seq.) of this chapter and provisions set out below, could be cited as the “Ysleta del Sur Pueblo and Alabama and Coushatta Indian Tribes of Texas Restoration Act”.Pub.
